title: YongleAI public code release: multi-engine candidate-annotation and validation pipeline for Yongle Palace Taoist mural image patches
description: Public software release metadata for the multi-engine candidate-annotation, validation, and packaging pipeline supporting the Scientific Data Data Descriptor for Yongle Palace Taoist mural image patches. The public GitHub repository is https://github.com/lbiceice/yongleai-scidata-pipeline and the release tag is v1.0.0. A Zenodo software DOI should be minted after the GitHub release is published through Zenodo-GitHub integration.

creators.name: Liang, Bingbing
creators.affiliation: Guangzhou College of Technology and Business; Faculty of Fine and Applied Arts, Khon Kaen University (PhD researcher)

notes: GitHub repository: https://github.com/lbiceice/yongleai-scidata-pipeline; release tag: v1.0.0. The Zenodo software DOI will be minted by Zenodo after this GitHub release is published and archived.
